description_long: This is a thick, hardbound book with a deep brown cover adorned with ornate gold decorative borders and a central illustration of a mythical creature resembling a griffin. The cover features intricate gold embellishments and stylized text, giving it an antique or magical appearance. The spine is robust and matches the cover in color and style, with gold detailing and text running vertically. When open, the book reveals aged, yellowed pages filled with dense, handwritten script and illuminated letters in red and black ink, suggesting it is an old manuscript or spellbook. The pages appear slightly warped and stained, adding to the sense of age and use. The book includes a ribbon bookmark visible at the bottom edge.
description: A thick, ornate hardbound book with a brown cover, gold embellishments, and an illustrated mythical creature. The open pages reveal aged, handwritten script and illuminated letters.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the side, showing the thickness of the pages and the layered structure of the cover and paper.
description_view_1: The front and back covers are visible, displaying gold decorative borders, an illustrated mythical creature, and ornate text.
description_view_2: Another side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the book's thickness and the separation between the cover and pages.
description_view_3: The book is open, revealing two pages filled with dense, handwritten script and illuminated letters, as well as a ribbon bookmark.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features an ornate gold border framing a central illustration of a mythical creature resembling a griffin, rendered in a stylized, medieval-inspired art style. The illustration is bold and dark, standing out against the brown background, and is surrounded by decorative flourishes.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is brown with gold decorative elements and vertically oriented gold text matching the cover's style. The design is ornate, with flourishes at the top and bottom.
